Oracc: CAMS/GKAB — CAMS Geography of Knowledge Corpus

SpTU 5, 301 [sale of house][via cams/gkab]

Obverse
o 1o 1

E₂ ša₂ KIti₃ KA₂.GAL dUTU ša₂ qe₂-reb UNUGki

(o 1) They sell for 5/6 mina of silver, for the complete price, to Anu-reʾušunu, son of Anu-ikṣur and Ubartu, his wife, daughter of Nidintu-Bel, the house which (is at) the city gate of Šamaš, inside Uruk, which (is) beside the house of Belšunu, son of Mušezib and beside the house of Nanaya-iddin, son of Napišti (and) which (was) formerly belonged to Ubar, son of Anu-ahhe-iqiša.

o 22

ša₂ DA E₂ mdEN-šu₂-nu DUMU ša₂ mmu-še-zib u DA E₂

o 33

mdna-na-a—MU DUMU ša₂ mZIti₃ ša₂ ina pa-na-ma

o 44

mu₂-bar DUMU ša₂ md60—ŠEŠ-MEŠ—BAša₂ a-na 5/6 MA.NA KU₃.BABBAR

o 55

a-na ŠAM₂ TIL-MEŠ a-na md60—SIPA-šu₂-nu DUMU ša₂

o 66

md60—ik-ṣur u fu₂-bar-tu₄ DAM-šu₂ DUMU.MUNUS

o 77

ša₂ mni-din-tu₄—dEN id-di-nu ar₂-ku U₄ 3-KAM₂ ša₂ itiZIZ₂

(o 7) Afterwards, the 3rd day of Šabaṭu, Ubar paid in full this silver of 5/6 mina (and) gave (it) to Anu-reʾišunu and Ubartu. There will never be lawsuit or claim from Anu-reʾušunu and Ubartu against Ubar concerning that house.

o 88

KU₃.BABBAR a₄ 5/6 MA.NA mu₂-bar ki-i u₂-ṭir₅-ri

o 99

a-na md60—SIPA-šu₂-nu u fu₂-bar-tu₄ it-ta-din

o 1010

mim-ma di-i-ni u ra-ga-mu ša₂ md60—SIPA-šu₂-nu

o 1111

⸢u fu₂⸣-bar-tu₄ ana UGU E₂ MU-MEŠ it-ti

Bottom
b.e. 1b.e. 1

m⸢u₂⸣-bar a-di u₄-mu ṣa-a-tu₄ ia₂-a-nu

Reverse
r 1r 1

lu₂mu-kin₇ mni-din-tu₄—d60 DUMU ša₂ mDIN

(r 1) Witnesses: Nidintu-Anu, son of Balaṭu; Anu-belszunu, son of Mušezib; Kuṣura, son of Libluṭ; Labaši, son of Šamaš-šum-iddin; Anu-ahhe-iddin, son of Bel-eṭir; Šamaš-iddin, son of Šamaš-ab-uṣur.

r 22

md60—EN-šu₂-nu DUMU ša₂ mmu-še-zib

r 33

mku-ṣur-a DUMU ša₂ mlib-luṭ

r 44

mla-ba-ši DUMU ša₂ mdUTU—MU—MU!

r 55

md60—ŠEŠ-MEŠ—MU! DUMU ša₂ mdEN—SUR

r 66

mdUTU—MU DUMU ša₂ mdUTU—AD—URI₃

(1 line blank)
r 77

md60—ma-an-nu lu₂UMBISAG DUMU ša₂ mRUti₃

(r 7) Anu-mannu, the scribe, son of Širikti. Uruk, the month Šabaṭu, 3rd day, 37th year of Artaxerxes, king of all the lands.

r 88

UNUGki itiZIZ₂ U₄ 3-KAM₂ MU 37

r 99

mar₂-taḫ-ša₂-as-sa-as₂ LUGAL KUR-MEŠ

Top
t.e. 1t.e. 1

na₄KIŠIB md60—ŠEŠ-MEŠ—MU na₄KIŠIB mdUTU—MU

(t.e. 1) Seal of An-ahhe-iddin; seal of Šamaš-iddin; seal of Anu-reʾušunu.

Left
l.e. 1l.e. 1

na₄KIŠIB md60—SIPA-šu₂-nu
